buildCommand: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' *.googleapis.com *.firebaseapp.com *.firebase.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; media-src 'self' blob: https:; connect-src 'self' https: wss: http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* *.googleapis.com *.firebaseio.com identitytoolkit.googleapis.com securetoken.googleapis.com; frame-src 'none'; object-src 'none';
